title: KEN WONDERLY MEMORIAL FUND - 211info
text: THE ARC JACKSON COUNTY KEN WONDERLY MEMORIAL FUND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A memorial fund that provides emergency financial assistance to those in urgent need of money to pay for such things as travel for a critical medical need, electricity, phone, rent, etc. 311 S Holly Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Must have an intellectual and/or developmental disability or be the parent or guardian of person with an intellectual and/or developmental disability who is living in the home Hours: Tuesday-Friday 10:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 283-3056 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 283-3056 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must have either a case manager with Jackson County Developmental Disabilities Services, a personal agent with Creative Supports, Inc., or a professional in the community (doctor, nurse, social worker, etc.) who can verify an intellectual/developmental disability diagnosis and fill out an application on behalf of the individual. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of emergency situation such as past-due notice on utility bill, shut-off notice, letter from landlord, or eviction notice AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - DIRECT SUPPORT PROFESSIONAL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE ARC JACKSON COUNTY
